project_type: TypeScript pnpm monorepo with turbo - 14 apps, 18 services, 41 packages
build_system: pnpm 10.28.1 + turbo for task orchestration. Each package has its own tsc build.
test_framework: vitest with globals enabled, v8 coverage. Tests co-located in __tests__/ or .test.ts files.
verification_instructions: Run pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm lint
contribution_requirements: Conventional commits, max ~500 LOC per diff. All gates must pass: install, typecheck, test, build, lint.
key_patterns: Packages export from src/index.ts barrel. Types in src/types.ts. Zod for validation schemas. Classes for domain logic. Pino for logging. Tests use describe/it/expect from vitest globals.
directory_structure: apps/<app>/ - frontend apps with optional /backend. packages/<pkg>/ - shared libraries. services/<svc>/ - backend microservices. infra/ - prometheus, grafana, otel, helm, terraform. docs/ - documentation. k6/ - load test scripts.
